languages.text: "Я услышал{mf||а} достаточно. Даю слово, я сохраню вашу тайну, Ювенна".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] Я услышал достаточно и сохраню вашу тайну.

languages.text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."
languages.original_text: "Я услышал{mf||а} достаточно. Даю слово, я сохраню вашу тайну, Ювенна".

traits.locale_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."
"I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."
"I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

languages.text: «He oído suficiente. Prometo guardar su secreto, Juvenna».
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: «He oído suficiente. Prometo guardar su secreto, Juvenna».

languages.text: “我听够了。我保证，我会对你的秘密守口如瓶，尤文娜。”
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: “我听够了。我保证，我会对你的秘密守口如瓶，尤文娜。”

languages.text: « J'en ai assez entendu. Je garderai votre secret, Juvenna, vous avez ma parole. »
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: « J'en ai assez entendu. Je garderai votre secret, Juvenna, vous avez ma parole. »

languages.text: "Yeterince duydum. Söz veriyorum, sırrını saklayacağım Juvenna."
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "Yeterince duydum. Söz veriyorum, sırrını saklayacağım Juvenna."

languages.text: "Ich habe genug gehört. Ihr habt mein Wort. Ich werde Euer Geheimnis bewahren, Juvenna."
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe genug gehört. Ihr habt mein Wort. Ich werde Euer Geheimnis bewahren, Juvenna."

languages.text: 「もう十分聞いた。君の話は守る。ジュベナ」
languages.original_text: "I have heard enough. You have my word, I will keep your secret, Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: 「もう十分聞いた。君の話は守る。ジュベナ」
